conbody.p:
You can search the reports in the User Defined section using the following criteria:
You can enter minimum three characters in the search box. If you enter less than three characters, the following error message is displayed: Please enter at-least three characters to search.
You can enter a word or three or more characters to search in the search box. In this case, the system performs a search and lists all the custom reports having the searched value. For example, clinical.
You can enter a phrase to search in the search box. In this case, the system performs a search for the exact match of the phrase. For example, clinical measures.
conbody.note: If you perform a search and no matching results are found, the following message is displayed: No records found.
